content.problemStatement:
You are given a binary string SSS of length NNN. Your task is to generate a new binary string TTT of the same length such that each corresponding character of TTT is different from the character at the same position in SSS.

In other words, for each position iii (0‚Č§i<N0 ‚Č§ i < N0‚Č§i<N), the following condition must hold Ti‚Č†SiT_i ‚Č† S_iTi‚ÄčÓÄ†=Si‚Äč.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains one integer NNN ‚ÄĒ the length of SSS.
The next line contains the binary string SSS.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line a binary string TTT of length NNN, where Ti‚Č†SiT_i ‚Č† S_iTi‚ÄčÓÄ†=Si‚Äč for all valid indices iii.
constraints: SSS is a binary string, i.e, contains only the characters 000 and 111.
The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 2‚čÖ1052\cdot 10^52‚čÖ105.
